attributes.magic: PE32 executable for MS Windows (GUI) Intel 80386 32-bit

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Adversaries may stop services or processes in order to conduct Data Destruction or Data Encrypted for Impact on the data stores of services like Exchange and SQL Server.
